---
title: "About"
description: "A little about who I am and what this site is for."
sidebar: false
page-layout: article
toc: true
---

## Who I am

I'm Sophia Jaffer — a writer with a restless curiosity about the world. I find myself drawn to places with deep histories, music that resists easy categorisation, landscapes that remind me how small I am, and art that makes me look twice.

This site is where I put those observations into words.

## What I write about

**Nature** — field notes, seasonal writing, and essays on the non-human world. I'm interested in ecology and in the way attention to the natural world sharpens how we see everything else.

**Music** — listening notes and longer essays. My tastes run from early music to contemporary composition, with many detours in between.

**History** — the past as a lens for the present. I'm drawn to lesser-known corners of history and to the way material culture — objects, buildings, landscapes — carries time.

**Travel** — dispatches from journeys near and far. I write about places slowly and specifically, not comprehensively.

**Arts** — responses to visual art, literature, film, and theatre. More personal essay than review.

## How to reach me

If something I've written resonates with you, or you'd like to suggest a subject, you're welcome to get in touch.
